checks.name: html_parse_executeGAS_GAS_URL
checks.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

checks.name: canvas_dialog_and_payload_callsite_check
checks.result: alert/confirm/prompt は検出なし。executeGAS(payload...) は syncPendingChanges, handleInit, loadSchedule と関数定義のみ。新規の個別書き込み通信は追加なし。

checks.name: schedule_readback_schema_check
checks.command: rg -n "function readSchedule\(|list.push\(\{ id: f\(r\[0\]\), date: f\(r\[1\]\)|sortOrder: Number\(r\[6\]\)" app.html
checks.result: syncPendingChanges 内 readSchedule が id/date/meal/recipeId/recipeName/status/sortOrder の8列構造で読み戻すことを確認。
